summary: JG12 Iteration 17 - Favorite Foods Feature fully verified. Backend: All 9 API tests pass (GET/POST/DELETE favorites, search with is_favorite field, favorites-first sorting). Frontend: BuildMealModal shows star icons (fav-toggle-{foodId}), yellow for favorited/gray for non-favorited, toggle works correctly. SearchFoodModal has star icons (fav-search-{foodId}) with same behavior.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/favorites returns favorites list for user
✅ Backend: POST /api/favorites/{food_id} adds food and returns updated list
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/favorites/{food_id} removes food and returns updated list
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/favorites/{food_id} for non-favorited food doesn't error
✅ Backend: Can add multiple different foods to favorites
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search shows is_favorite field for each food
✅ Backend: Search marks favorited foods with is_favorite=true correctly
✅ Backend: Search sorts favorites first > frequency > alphabetical
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal shows star icons next to each food (data-testid='fav-toggle-{foodId}')
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal star is yellow (text-yellow-400) for favorited foods
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal star is gray (text-gray-300) for non-favorited foods
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal clicking star toggles favorite state (yellow↔gray)
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal search results show favorites at top (first item has filled star)
✅ Frontend: SearchFoodModal has star icons (data-testid='fav-search-{foodId}') in code
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage loads favorites on mount and passes to modals
critical_code_review_comments: users.py: Favorites endpoints correctly use MongoDB $addToSet (no duplicates) and $pull (remove)
calculator.py: Search endpoint correctly marks is_favorite and sorts by (is_favorite DESC, frequency DESC, nombre ASC)
BuildMealModal.jsx: Correctly loads favorites on mount, toggleFavorite calls API and updates local state
BuildMealModal.jsx: Star icon uses lucide-react Star with fill='currentColor' for favorited, fill='none' for non-favorited
SearchFoodModal.jsx: Accepts favorites/onToggleFavorite props and renders star icons with correct data-testid
NutritionPage.jsx: Manages favorites state, loadFavorites on mount, toggleFavorite function, passes to SearchFoodModal
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration17_favorites.py - Created comprehensive test suite for favorites feature
seed_data_creation: clientedemo has existing favorites [42, 117, 831] in food_favorites collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified favorites feature: Backend uses food_favorites MongoDB collection with {user_id, food_ids[]}. GET/POST/DELETE /api/favorites endpoints work. Search endpoint includes is_favorite field and sorts favorites first. Frontend: BuildMealModal uses fav-toggle-{foodId} testids, SearchFoodModal uses fav-search-{foodId} testids. Star colors: yellow-400 (favorited), gray-300 (not favorited). Toggle works via API call. Today is rest day (descanso) for clientedemo.
